summary: Frontend testing of Protein Planner v2 State Engine V3 features. All UI components load correctly without crashes. Homepage, MacroFork, Calculator Disclaimer, and Onboarding screens work properly. Form validation and submission work. External n8n webhook API returns empty responses (HTTP 200 with empty body), preventing full E2E testing of V3 components (supplement_ask, budget_setup, source_select, etc.). Error handling UI gracefully handles API failures.

minor.issue: External n8n webhook API returns HTTP 200 with empty body (content-length: 0) - not under our control

integration_issues.issue: Cannot functionally test V3 components (SupplementAsk, DistributionSetup, SourceChips, CutChips, ProductCardGrid, PortionConfirmCard, MealBadge, Consolidation, WeeklySummary, DeliveryFrequency, TimeSlotSelect, OrderConfirmed) with real API data - external n8n webhook returns empty responses

V3_components_implemented.DistributionSetup: Line 705 - Budget setup with distribution patterns
V3_components_implemented.SourceChips: Line 826 - Multi-select with carried portions info
V3_components_implemented.ProductCardGrid: Line 1032 - GROUP BY SOURCE with 'Pick 1' per category
V3_components_implemented.Consolidation: Line 1517 - NEW V3 summary with Edit menu
V3_components_implemented.WeeklySummary: Line 1652 - 7-day view with tabs and edit

RunningCostBanner.feature: Shows daily/weekly costs in sticky banner

CollapsedBadge_V3.feature: Shows correct summary text for each ui_type including supplement_ask, delivery_frequency, consolidation

Edit_functionality.Consolidation: Lines 1576-1585 + 1636-1644 - Edit buttons for each meal + Modify dropdown menu
Edit_functionality.WeeklySummary: Lines 1655-1656 + edit menu - Tab-based view with edit capability

Product_grouping_by_source.feature: Products grouped by category/source with 'Pick 1' label per category

Utilization_options.feature: Shows utilization options for leftover portions with radio buttons

playwright_tests_executed: TEST 1: Homepage loads correctly - PASS (title, CTA, features visible)
TEST 2: MacroFork screen loads - PASS (title, inputs, buttons, info tip)
TEST 3: Form validation works - PASS (button enables after form fill)
TEST 4: Form submission - PASS (graceful error handling when API returns empty)
TEST 5: Calculator Disclaimer screen - PASS (title, steps, Let's go button)
TEST 6: Onboarding step 1 - PASS (name, age, gender fields)
TEST 7: Journey tracker - PASS (shows progress through steps)
critical_code_review_comments: All V3 ui_types properly defined in knownUiTypes array
All V3 components implemented with proper defensive guards
Edit functionality present in MealBadge, Consolidation, and WeeklySummary
ProductCardGrid implements product grouping by source with 'Pick 1' per category
RunningCostBanner component implemented for daily/weekly cost display
CollapsedBadge handles all V3 ui_types correctly
NO issues found - code is well-structured with comprehensive defensive programming

success_rate.backend: N/A - External n8n API dependency (not under our control)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All screens load correctly, no crashes, error handling works

context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3 State Engine features have been verified through code review. Frontend components are properly implemented. External n8n webhook API (karanbabbar.app.n8n.cloud) continues to return empty responses. To fully functional test V3 components in action, either mock the API or wait for n8n webhook to be operational. The app handles API errors gracefully with retry UI.

rca_of_issue.external_api_empty_response: The n8n webhook API at https://karanbabbar.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/v2/meal-planning returns HTTP 200 with empty body. This is an external dependency not under our control. The frontend correctly handles this with error UI showing 'Something went wrong. Tap to retry.'
